    SPANNERS OR WRENCHES, ratcheting box (ring) type, having hexagonal
 or bi-hexagonal ratcheting box (ring) type openings at both ends,
 but NOT including spanners or wrenches put up in packs with goods
 OTHER THAN ratcheting box (ring) type spanners or wrenches
    		30/05/198503/06/1985
    8204.118532153 
    SPANNERS OR WRENCHES, being ANY of the types listed in TABLE A,
 but NOT including ANY of the goods listed in TABLE B
                               TABLE A
   (a) ring;
   (b) combination (ring and open end);
   (c) flexible head;
   (d) box wrench
                               TABLE B
   (a) spanners or wrenches put up in packs with goods OTHER THAN
       those listed in TABLE A;
   (b) spanners or wrenches or packs containing spanners or
       wrenches having one or both ends in ANY of the following
       sizes:
         (i) SAE or AF : 7/32 in. to 1 7/8 in. (both inclusive),
                         2 in. to 2 1/4 in. (both inclusive),
                         2 3/8 in., 2 1/2 in., 2 5/8 in.,
                         2 3/4 in., 2 15/16 in. or 3 1/8 in.;
        (ii) Metric    : 4 mm to 28 mm (both inclusive),
                         30 mm, 32 mm, 36 mm, 38 mm, 41 mm, 46 mm,
                         50 mm or 55 mm;
       (iii) Whitworth : 1/8 in. to 3/4 in. (both inclusive),
                         7/8 in., 1 in. or 1 1/8 in.;
        (iv) BS        : 3/16 in. to 3/4 in. (both inclusive),
                         7/8 in., 1 in., 1 1/8 in. or 1 1/4 in.
    		30/05/198505/06/1985
    8204.118532152 
    SPANNERS OR WRENCHES, open end type, but NOT including ANY of the
 following:
   (a) spanners or wrenches put up in packs with goods OTHER THAN
       open end type spanners or wrenches;
   (b) spanners or wrenches or packs containing open end type
       spanners or wrenches having one or both ends in ANY of the
       following sizes:
         (i) SAE or AF : 7/32 in. to 1 5/8 in. (both inclusive);
        (ii) Metric    : 4 mm to 27 mm (both inclusive), 30 mm,
                         32 mm or 36 mm;
       (iii) Whitworth : 1/8 in. to 3/4 in. (both inclusive),
                         7/8 in. or 1 in.;
        (iv) BS        : 3/16 in. to 3/4 in. (both inclusive),
                         7/8 in., 1 in. or 1 1/8 in.
    		30/05/198503/06/1985
    8204.118532151

    SPANNERS OR WRENCHES, being ANY of the types listed in TABLE A,
 but NOT including ANY of the goods listed in TABLE B

   (b) combination (ring and open end);
   (c) flexible head;
   (d) open end
                            TABLE B

       those listed in TABLE A;
   (b) spanners or wrenches or packs containing spanner or wrenches
       having one or both ends in ANY of the following sizes:
       (i) SAE or AF  :  7/32" to 1.5/8" (both inclusive);
       (ii) METRIC    :  4 mm to 28 mm (both inclusive) 30 mm, 32 mm
                         36 mm;
       (iii) WHITWORTH:  1/8" TO 1" (both inclusive);
       (iv)  BS       :  2BA, 1/4" to 1.1/8" (both inclusive)

    BITS, machine tool, being woodworking drilling bits, but NOT
 including ANY of the following:
   (a) dowelling bits having a dia exceeding 6.2 mm but NOT
       exceeding 15.9 mm;
   (b) flat power bits having a dia exceeding 9.5 mm but NOT
       exceeding 25.4 mm;
   (c) machine bits with scotch pattern noses or jennings pattern
       noses;
   (d) router bits;
   (e) single flute wood bits having a dia exceeding 1.50 mm
       but NOT exceeding 9.55 mm;
   (f) twin flute wood bits having a dia exceeding 6.2 mm but
       NOT exceeding 12.7 mm;
   (g) wood screw pilot bits NOT capable of drilling holes having
       a depth exceeding 38 mm
   For the purposes of TC 8431291 the machine bits excluded may
   be of the solid centre type or the double twist type

    The Australian Border Force acknowledges the Traditional Custodians of Country throughout Australia and their continuing connection to land, sea and community.
